title: Argentinian Garlic Steak Skewers
description: Grilled steak skewers with a hint of garlic and a juicy twist, inspired by traditional Argentinian flavors.

ingredients.name: Argentinian steak
ingredients.notes: preferably flank steak or skirt steak

ingredients.name: Garlicky olive oil
ingredients.notes: or regular olive oil with minced garlic

instructions: 2. In a small bowl, mix together garlicky olive oil, salt, and pepper.
3. Brush the mixture evenly onto both sides of the steak.
4. Thread the steak, pineapple, onion, and bell pepper onto the skewers.
5. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the steak reaches 135°F for medium-rare.
6. Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
7. Slice the steak into thin strips and serve with the grilled vegetables.
